10.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Shop Online - BIKE24
10.evidenceText: No retail prices found in the provided sources. Source 1 lists product names and descriptions but not prices. Source 2 contains only marketing description.
10.extractionRationale: Despite searching both sources (BIKE24 product listing and Schwalbe official product page), no specific retail prices in EUR or any other currency were mentioned in the extracted content.

27.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Tubeless-Ventil - 2er Set - 80 mm | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Counted distinct product pages: (1) p1859950 - Clik Valve Tubeless-Ventil 2er Set 80mm, (2) p1962381 - Schlauch Nr. 13 with Clik Valve, (3) p1962278 - Schlauch Nr. 15 with Clik Valve. Excluded p1859952 and p1859955 as they are conversion kits with pump heads (accessories).
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs for Clik valve listings. Sources 1, 4, and 5 represent distinct main product listings. Sources 2 and 3 are conversion kits with pump heads (accessories) and were excluded per instructions to not count accessories like pump heads.

30.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve product listings - BIKE24
30.evidenceText: No stock status information present in any of the 4 product listings. Content includes product descriptions and navigation only.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status indicators (out of stock, unavailable, nicht verfügbar, ausverkauft) are not mentioned in any of the provided source content. Cannot determine stock availability from the evidence provided.

56.evidenceText: Schlauch - No. 17 | 28 Zoll | 28-47/622-635 | Clik Valve (SCV); Schlauch - No. 19 | 27.5/28/29 Zoll | 40-62/622-635 | Clik Valve (SCV); Schlauch - Nr. 3 | 16" - 47/62-305 | Clik Valve (SCV) 40mm; Schlauch - Nr. 15 | 28"/700C - 23/30-622/630 | Clik Valve (SCV); Schlauch - Nr. 15L-EL (Extra Light) | 28" - 28/32-622/630 | SCV; Schlauch - No. 19L | 27.5"/28"/29" | MTB+ - 54/75-584/622 | SCV 40mm; Schlauch - Nr. 12 | 26" - 30/47-559/597 | Clik Valve (SCV) 40mm
56.extractionRationale: Counted distinct Schwalbe inner tube models with Clik valve interface from BIKE24 product listings. Excluded conversion kits (Umrüstkit), standalone valves, and pump adapters as they are not inner tubes. Identified 7 unique tube models by their product names and size specifications.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest Price Today
62.evidenceText: Premiums for consumers buying aluminium on the physical market in the United States hit a record 60 cents a lb
62.extractionRationale: The source explicitly states the US aluminum premium at 60 cents per lb. Converted from cents to USD: 60 cents/lb = $0.60/lb as requested.
